description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a series of evenly spaced, dark wooden slats forming both the seat and the backrest. The slats are gently curved, providing ergonomic support and a contemporary aesthetic. The bench is supported by two sturdy, arched metal legs on each side, which are painted a light gray and have a decorative, openwork design. The absence of armrests gives the bench a minimalist look and allows for seating from either side. The construction appears robust, suitable for public spaces such as parks or sidewalks, and the materials are chosen for durability and weather resistance. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, blending natural wood with industrial metal elements.
description: A modern bench with curved wooden slats and decorative metal legs, designed for outdoor public spaces. It features a backrest but no armrests, combining durability with a sleek, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wooden slats forming the seat and backrest, with both metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the continuous backrest slats and the open, arched design of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Back corner view emphasizing the length of the bench and the structural support provided by the metal legs.
description_view_3: Front angled view displaying the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the open sides without armrests.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports with openwork design
